category_sources: Official Ghostunnel docs describe using Ghostunnel for mTLS-secured proxying.
source_facts.description says it is a simple SSL/TLS proxy with mutual authentication.
display_name_sources: Official site and repository use Ghostunnel.
docs_sources: Official Ghostunnel docs include a getting-started guide.
Official GitHub README is an official documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ghostunnel/ghostunnel; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official docs focus on mTLS setup and secure proxy usage.
source_facts.description mentions SSL/TLS proxy and mutual authentication.
